commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cc32d164d51fc9d6875b24fba2b42dfc6b57354e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR routes iMessage inbound reply dispatch through the shared channel streaming resolver, adds iMessage nested delivery-streaming schema/type support, and expands focused tests for iMessage monitor dispatch and block-streaming config lookup.

PR surface: Source +68, Tests +229, Generated +1. Total +298 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible from the PR head: channel nested `streaming.block.enabled=true` plus account flat `blockStreaming=false` leaves both values on the merged config, and the shared resolver picks nested `true`. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve explicit account-level iMessage block-streaming opt-outs and add the missing regression coverage.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
